# BasaltCRM API

> BasaltCRM is an enterprise CRM platform with 90+ REST API endpoints spanning core CRM entities, sales pipelines, customer support, AI-driven lead generation, voice agents, agent commerce, and a headless External API for ecommerce integrations.

## Table of Contents

- [Authentication](#authentication)
- [Response Format](#response-format)
- [External API v1 (Bearer Token)](#external-api-v1)
  - [Contacts](#v1-contacts)
  - [Leads](#v1-leads)
  - [Accounts](#v1-accounts)
  - [Messages (Bidirectional)](#v1-messages)
  - [Opportunities](#v1-opportunities)
  - [Tasks](#v1-tasks)
- [Internal CRM API (Session-Based)](#internal-crm-api)
  - [Core Dynamics](#core-dynamics)
  - [Sales & Revenue](#sales--revenue)
  - [Support & Success](#support--success)
  - [Growth & AI](#growth--ai)
  - [Operations](#operations)
- [Error Codes](#error-codes)
- [Ecommerce Integration Quickstart](#ecommerce-integration-quickstart)

---

## Authentication

BasaltCRM uses two authentication mechanisms:

### 1. External API (Bearer Token) — `/api/v1/*`

For external integrations (ecommerce, headless CRM). Include your API key in every request header:

```
Authorization: Bearer sk_live_your_api_key_here
```

Generate keys from Admin → API & Webhooks. Keys use bcrypt hashing and are shown only once at creation. All requests are scoped to the tenant associated with the API key. Every request (success or failure) is logged to `crm_ApiLogs` for auditing.

### 2. Internal CRM API (Session) — `/api/crm/*`, `/api/invoice/*`, etc.

For the CRM web application. Requires a valid NextAuth.js session (cookie-based). All routes are scoped to the authenticated user's team.

## Base URL

```
https://your-crm-domain.com
```

## Response Format

### External API v1

Success (single resource):
```json
{
  "data": { ... }
}
```

Success (paginated list):
```json
{
  "data": [ ... ],
  "meta": {
    "total": 42,
    "page": 1,
    "pageSize": 25,
    "hasMore": true
  }
}
```

Error:
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "NOT_FOUND",
    "message": "Resource not found"
  }
}
```

### Pagination

All list endpoints accept `?page=1&pageSize=25` (max 100).

---

# External API v1

Bearer-token authenticated endpoints for ecommerce integrations and headless CRM access. All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...` header.

---

## V1 Contacts

Manage individual people (customers). Supports email-based upsert deduplication — safe to call on every ecommerce purchase without creating duplicates.

### GET /api/v1/contacts

List contacts for your team. Supports pagination and filtering.

Query Parameters:
| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| pageSize | number | Results per page (default: 25, max: 100) |
| email | string | Filter by email (partial match) |
| status | string | Filter by active status |
| type | string | Filter by contact type |
| search | string | Search across name and email |

Example Response:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "abc123",
      "team_id": "team456",
      "first_name": "Jane",
      "last_name": "Doe",
      "email": "jane@example.com",
      "status": true,
      "type": "Customer",
      "tags": ["vip"],
      "accountsIDs": "acc789",
      "opportunitiesIDs": ["opp123"],
      "cratedAt": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "meta": { "total": 1, "page": 1, "pageSize": 25, "hasMore": false }
}
```

### POST /api/v1/contacts

Create or upsert a contact. If a contact with the same email exists within the tenant, it updates the existing record instead of creating a duplicate.

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| last_name | string | Yes | Last name |
| first_name | string | No | First name |
| email | string | No | Email address (used for deduplication) |
| mobile_phone | string | No | Mobile phone number |
| office_phone | string | No | Office phone number |
| personal_email | string | No | Personal email |
| tags | string[] | No | Array of tag strings |
| type | string | No | Contact type (e.g. "Customer", "Partner") |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "first_name": "Jane",
  "last_name": "Doe",
  "email": "jane@shop.com",
  "mobile_phone": "+1234567890",
  "tags": ["vip", "ecommerce"]
}
```

Example Response (201 Created or 200 Upserted):
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "abc123",
    "team_id": "team456",
    "accountId": null,
    "first_name": "Jane",
    "last_name": "Doe",
    "email": "jane@shop.com",
    "mobile_phone": "+1234567890",
    "type": "Customer",
    "status": true,
    "_upserted": false
  }
}
```

Key response fields for chaining:
- `data.id` → use as `contactId` when creating an opportunity
- `data.team_id` → tenant identifier
- `data.accountId` → linked account (if any)
- `data._upserted` → `true` if existing record was updated, absent on new creates

### GET /api/v1/contacts/{contactId}

Get a single contact by ID.

Path Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| contactId | string | Yes | Contact ID |

### PUT /api/v1/contacts/{contactId}

Update a contact. Partial update — only pass fields you want to change.

Path Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| contactId | string | Yes | Contact ID |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "first_name": "Jane",
  "tags": ["vip", "returning"]
}
```

### DELETE /api/v1/contacts/{contactId}

Soft-delete a contact (sets status to inactive). Does not permanently remove data.

Path Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| contactId | string | Yes | Contact ID |

---

## V1 Leads

Manage prospective customers. Email-based upsert deduplication.

### GET /api/v1/leads

List leads. Filterable by status, email, company, pipeline stage.

Query Parameters:
| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| pageSize | number | Results per page (default: 25, max: 100) |
| status | string | Filter by status: NEW, CONTACTED, QUALIFIED, LOST |
| email | string | Filter by email |
| company | string | Filter by company name |
| pipeline_stage | string | Filter by pipeline stage |
| search | string | Search across name, email, company |

### POST /api/v1/leads

Create or upsert a lead. Deduplicates by email within the tenant.

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| lastName | string | Yes | Last name |
| firstName | string | No | First name |
| email | string | No | Email address (used for deduplication) |
| company | string | No | Company name |
| lead_source | string | No | Source (e.g., "Website", "Referral", "API") |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "email": "john@acme.com",
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "lead_source": "Website"
}
```

### GET /api/v1/leads/{leadId}

Get a single lead by ID.

### PUT /api/v1/leads/{leadId}

Update a lead. Partial update.

### DELETE /api/v1/leads/{leadId}

Soft-delete a lead (sets status to ARCHIVED).

---

## V1 Accounts

Company/organization profiles. Name-based upsert deduplication.

### GET /api/v1/accounts

List company accounts.

Query Parameters:
| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| pageSize | number | Results per page (default: 25, max: 100) |
| name | string | Filter by company name |
| status | string | Filter by status |
| search | string | Search across name and other fields |

### POST /api/v1/accounts

Create or upsert an account. Deduplicates by name within the tenant.

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | Company name (used for deduplication) |
| email | string | No | Company email |
| type | string | No | Account type (e.g., "Customer", "Partner", "Vendor") |
| website | string | No | Company website URL |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "name": "Acme Corp",
  "email": "info@acme.com",
  "type": "Customer",
  "website": "https://acme.com"
}
```

Example Response (201 Created or 200 Upserted):
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "acc789",
    "team_id": "team456",
    "name": "Acme Corp",
    "email": "info@acme.com",
    "type": "Customer",
    "status": "Active",
    "website": "https://acme.com",
    "_upserted": false
  }
}
```

Key response fields for chaining:
- `data.id` → use as `accountId` when creating an opportunity
- `data.team_id` → tenant identifier
- `data._upserted` → `true` if existing record was updated

### GET /api/v1/accounts/{accountId}

Get account with linked contacts and leads included.

### PUT /api/v1/accounts/{accountId}

Update an account. Partial update.

### DELETE /api/v1/accounts/{accountId}

Soft-delete an account (sets status to Inactive).

---

## V1 Messages

Bidirectional messaging between your ecommerce site and CRM. Supports conversation threading via `conversation_id`. Channels: EMAIL, SMS, NOTE, API.

### GET /api/v1/messages

List messages. Filter by contact, lead, direction, channel, or conversation thread.

Query Parameters:
| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| pageSize | number | Results per page (default: 25, max: 100) |
| contactId | string | Filter messages for this contact |
| leadId | string | Filter messages for this lead |
| direction | string | INBOUND or OUTBOUND |
| channel | string | EMAIL, SMS, NOTE, or API |
| conversation_id | string | Filter by conversation thread ID |

### POST /api/v1/messages

Send an outbound message to a contact or lead. When `channel` is `"email"`, the message is automatically delivered via email.

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| to | object | Yes | Recipient. One of: `{ contactId }`, `{ leadId }`, or `{ email }` (auto-resolves to existing contact/lead) |
| body | string | Yes | Message content |
| subject | string | No | Message subject line |
| channel | string | No | Delivery channel: "email", "sms", "note" (default: "note") |
| conversation_id | string | No | Thread ID. Auto-generated UUID if omitted |
| metadata | object | No | Arbitrary metadata (e.g., orderId, source) |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "to": { "email": "jane@shop.com" },
  "subject": "Order Update",
  "body": "Your order has shipped!",
  "channel": "email"
}
```

Example Response:
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "msg_123",
    "conversation_id": "conv_456",
    "direction": "OUTBOUND",
    "channel": "EMAIL",
    "subject": "Order Update",
    "body": "Your order has shipped!",
    "recipientEmail": "jane@shop.com",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-11T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

### POST /api/v1/messages/inbound

Webhook endpoint: push inbound customer messages into the CRM. Auto-creates contacts for unknown email addresses (tagged `["auto-created", "inbound-api"]`). Updates `last_activity` timestamp on the matched contact.

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| email | string | Conditional | Sender email. Required if contactId and leadId not provided |
| contactId | string | Conditional | Contact ID of the sender |
| leadId | string | Conditional | Lead ID of the sender |
| body | string | Yes | Message content |
| subject | string | No | Subject line |
| conversation_id | string | No | Thread ID to append to an existing conversation |
| channel | string | No | Channel: "email", "sms", "api" (default: "api") |
| metadata | object | No | Arbitrary metadata (e.g., orderId, source) |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "email": "customer@shop.com",
  "body": "Where is my order?",
  "subject": "Order Question",
  "conversation_id": "conv_456",
  "metadata": { "orderId": "ORD-789" }
}
```

### GET /api/v1/messages/{messageId}

Get a single message with full conversation thread context.

Response includes a `thread` array with all messages in the same conversation, ordered chronologically.

### GET /api/v1/messages/threads/{threadId}

Get an entire conversation thread by conversation_id.

Response:
```json
{
  "data": {
    "summary": {
      "threadId": "conv_456",
      "messageCount": 3,
      "firstMessageAt": "2026-03-10T...",
      "lastMessageAt": "2026-03-11T...",
      "participants": { "leadId": null, "contactId": "contact_abc" }
    },
    "messages": [
      {
        "id": "msg_1",
        "direction": "OUTBOUND",
        "channel": "EMAIL",
        "subject": "Order Update",
        "body": "Your order has shipped!",
        "createdAt": "2026-03-10T..."
      },
      {
        "id": "msg_2",
        "direction": "INBOUND",
        "channel": "API",
        "subject": "Question",
        "body": "Where is my order?",
        "createdAt": "2026-03-11T..."
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

---

## V1 Opportunities

Deal pipeline and revenue tracking. Link opportunities to accounts, contacts, and leads.

### GET /api/v1/opportunities

List opportunities. Filterable by pipeline stage and name.

Query Parameters:
| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| pageSize | number | Results per page (default: 25, max: 100) |
| search | string | Search by opportunity name |
| sales_stage | string | Filter by pipeline stage ID |

### POST /api/v1/opportunities

Create an opportunity. `sales_stage` and `type` accept either an ObjectId or a human-readable name (auto-resolved to the matching record in your CRM's configured stages/types).

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | Opportunity name |
| description | string | No | Description |
| budget | number | No | Deal value in whole units (integer, default: 0) |
| expected_revenue | number | No | Expected revenue (integer, default: 0) |
| currency | string | No | Currency code (default: "USD") |
| sales_stage | string | No | Pipeline stage name or ID (e.g., "Prospecting", "Negotiation", "Closed Won") |
| type | string | No | Opportunity type name or ID |
| close_date | string | No | Expected close date (ISO 8601, e.g., "2026-06-30") |
| assigned_to | string | No | Assigned user ID |
| accountId | string | No | Linked account ID |
| contactId | string | No | Linked contact ID |
| leadId | string | No | Linked lead ID |
| lead_source | string | No | Lead source (e.g., "Website", "Referral") |
| next_step | string | No | Next action item |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "name": "NAD+ Wholesale Partnership",
  "description": "Bulk order for wellness clinic chain",
  "budget": 25000,
  "expected_revenue": 50000,
  "currency": "USD",
  "sales_stage": "Negotiation",
  "type": "New Business",
  "close_date": "2026-06-30",
  "contactId": "abc123...",
  "lead_source": "Website",
  "next_step": "Send contract"
}
```

Example Response:
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "opp_789",
    "name": "NAD+ Wholesale Partnership",
    "budget": 25000,
    "expected_revenue": 50000,
    "currency": "USD",
    "sales_stage": "64a1b2c3d4e5f6789...",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "close_date": "2026-06-30T00:00:00.000Z",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-13T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

### GET /api/v1/opportunities/{opportunityId}

Get a single opportunity by ID.

### PUT /api/v1/opportunities/{opportunityId}

Update an opportunity. Partial update — only include fields you want to change. Same body parameters as POST.

---

## V1 Tasks

Task management and assignment.

### GET /api/v1/tasks

List tasks.

Query Parameters:
| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number (default: 1) |
| pageSize | number | Results per page (default: 25, max: 100) |
| status | string | Filter by status: TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE |

### POST /api/v1/tasks

Create a task.

Body Parameters:
| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|------|------|----------|-------------|
| title | string | Yes | Task title |
| description | string | No | Task description |
| status | string | No | Status (default: "TODO") |
| priority | string | No | Priority: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH (default: "MEDIUM") |
| due_date | string | No | Due date (ISO 8601) |

Example Body:
```json
{
  "title": "Follow up with Jane",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "status": "TODO",
  "due_date": "2026-04-01"
}
```

### GET /api/v1/tasks/{taskId}

Get a single task.

### PUT /api/v1/tasks/{taskId}

Update a task. Partial update.

---

# Internal CRM API

Session-authenticated endpoints used by the CRM web application. Requires valid NextAuth.js cookie.

---

## Core Dynamics

### Leads (Internal)

Manage potential customers and prospecting data.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/leads | List all leads for the current team |
| POST | /api/crm/leads | Create or merge a new lead record |
| GET | /api/crm/leads/[leadId] | Retrieve detailed lead data |
| PUT | /api/crm/leads/[leadId] | Update lead status and attributes |
| DELETE | /api/crm/leads/[leadId] | Remove a lead record (SOC2 Compliant) |
| POST | /api/crm/leads/[leadId]/activities | Log call/email activity |
| GET | /api/crm/leads/list | Paginated lead list with advanced filters |

### Accounts (Internal)

Organizations and companies linked to contacts and deals.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/account | List all company accounts |
| POST | /api/crm/account | Create a new organization profile |
| PUT | /api/crm/account | Bulk update company attributes |
| DELETE | /api/crm/account/[accountId] | Archive or delete a company profile |
| GET | /api/crm/account/[accountId] | Get account and linked contacts |

### Contacts (Internal)

Individual people belonging to accounts.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/contacts | List all individual contacts |
| POST | /api/crm/contacts | Create contact with account linking |
| GET | /api/crm/contacts/[contactId] | Retrieve individual contact profile |
| DELETE | /api/crm/contacts/[contactId] | Purge contact data |

---

## Sales & Revenue

### Opportunities (Internal)

Deal pipeline and revenue forecasting.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/opportunity | List all deals in the pipeline |
| POST | /api/crm/opportunity | Create a new deal opportunity |
| PUT | /api/crm/opportunity/[opportunityId] | Update deal stage or value |
| DELETE | /api/crm/opportunity/[opportunityId] | Discard lost or voided deals |

### Billing & Invoices

Invoicing and payment lifecycle.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/invoice | List all team invoices |
| POST | /api/invoice | Generate a new invoice |
| GET | /api/invoice/[id] | Retrieve invoice payment status |

---

## Support & Success

### Cases & Tickets

Post-sale support and issue tracking.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/cases | List team support cases |
| POST | /api/crm/cases | Create new support ticket |
| PUT | /api/crm/cases | Update case status or assignment |
| GET | /api/crm/cases/[caseId] | Get full case history |

### Knowledge Base

Self-service documentation and help articles.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/knowledge/articles | Fetch help center articles |
| GET | /api/crm/knowledge/categories | Browse article categories |

---

## Growth & AI

### Lead Pools & LeadGen

Autonomous AI-driven prospecting and lead intelligence.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/crm/leads/pools | Browse intelligence lead pools |
| POST | /api/crm/leads/autogen | Trigger LeadGen Wizard job |
| DELETE | /api/crm/leads/pools | Purge lead pool and associated data |

### Voice & AI (BasaltECHO)

Real-time AI voice conversation control.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| POST | /api/voice/engage/webhook | BasaltECHO event receiver |
| POST | /api/oauth/token | BasaltECHO connection token |

### Agent Commerce (UCP)

Standardized UCP-compliant commerce for agentic workflows. Implements x402 payment protocol.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/agent/catalog | Fetch agent-discoverable services |
| GET | /api/v1/agent/purchase/[sku] | Generate 402 Payment Challenge for SKU |
| POST | /api/v1/agent/purchase/[sku] | Finalize purchase with payment proof |

---

## Operations

### Calendar & Events

Scheduling and resource management.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/calendar/events | List upcoming team meetings |
| POST | /api/calendar/schedule | Book a new meeting slot |
| GET | /api/calendar/availability | Check user or team availability |

---

## Error Codes

| Status | Code | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | Invalid request body or missing required fields |
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | Missing or invalid API key |
| 402 | PAYMENT_REQUIRED | API generation requires an active paid plan |
| 403 | FORBIDDEN | Insufficient permissions (not an admin) |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | Resource not found or doesn't belong to your tenant |
| 500 | INTERNAL_ERROR | Unexpected server error |

---

## Rate Limiting

BasaltCRM supports up to 10 concurrent requests per API key. Bulk operations should be batched via the `/api/crm/leads/pools/import` endpoint.

---

## Ecommerce Integration Quickstart

1. Generate an API key from Admin → API & Webhooks
2. Store in `.env`: `CRM_API_KEY=sk_live_...`
3. On customer signup/purchase: `POST /api/v1/contacts` with email (upserts automatically)
4. Create leads from form submissions: `POST /api/v1/leads`
5. Link to company accounts: `POST /api/v1/accounts`
6. Send order updates: `POST /api/v1/messages` with `channel: "email"`
7. Receive customer replies: POST to `/api/v1/messages/inbound` from your email/chat system
8. Track deals: `POST /api/v1/opportunities`
9. Assign follow-ups: `POST /api/v1/tasks`
10. View conversations in CRM under the contact/lead timeline

## Links

- [API Reference (Interactive)](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/api-reference)
- [Authentication Guide](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/authentication)
- [Webhooks](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/webhooks)
- [Workflows & Automation](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/workflows)
